seo.title: Tourism Guide to Gijón: Everything you need to know in 2026
seo.intro: Gijón is much more than a beach city. It is the cultural and gastronomic capital of Asturias: a destination that combines kilometres of coastline, modernist architecture and a culinary scene revolving around cider and seasonal fish.
mustSeeList: San Lorenzo Beach: the longest urban beach in Spain, right in the city centre.
Cimadevilla: the historic fishermen's neighbourhood with the best views of the Cantabrian Sea.
Chillida's Elogio del Horizonte: the most photographed sculpture in the city.
El Muro: the seafront promenade connecting the entire coastal strip.
Botanical Garden: one of the most important in northern Spain.
seo.gastroTitle: Gastronomy: the art of cider and good food
seo.gastroText: Gijón's gastronomy revolves around the sidrería: a social ritual where natural cider accompanies seasonal dishes. Cachopo, pote asturiano and Cantabrian seafood are the stars of any respectable table.

footer.tagline: Your trusted guide to discovering the best of the Asturian coast.
